phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Islamic ceramics are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as cerâmicas islâmicas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH seh-RAHN-mee-kuhsh eezh-LAHN-mee-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tavira's Islamic heritage is prominently displayed in dedicated rooms reflecting the Algarve's Moorish past.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso apanhar o equipamento de áudio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-pahn-NYAHR AW eh-kee-puh-MAYNG-too DIH OW-deeoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio equipment is standard for self-guided tours through the convent's historical rooms.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no ponto de recolha à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO POHNG-too DIH reh-KOH-lyuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, at the pickup point by the entrance.

responses.english: Good day, at the pickup point by the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO POHNG-too DIH reh-KOH-lyuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no ponto de recolha à entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Islamic ceramics are
phrases.cultural_note: The Islamic ceramics collection is a permanent exhibit at the museum.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a ala arqueológica.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-luh uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the archaeological wing.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the archaeological wing.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH AH-luh uh-ruh-kihoo-LAW-zhee-kuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a ala arqueológica.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Islamic ceramics are
phrases.text_local: Onde está exposta a cerâmica islâmica antiga?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH ehsh-PAWSH-tuh AH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh eezh-LAHN-mee-kuh ahnng-TEE-guh?
phrases.cultural_note: The collection highlights regional kiln traditions, often housed in separate exhibition wings.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gift shop is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de presentes do museu?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah LO-zhah jee pre-ZEN-chees doo moo-ZAY-oo
phrases.cultural_note: Retail spaces in Portuguese municipal museums are conventionally placed near exits to manage visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à saída principal do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, next to the main museum exit.

responses.english: Good day, next to the main museum exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à saída principal do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the convent cloister is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o claustro do antigo convento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW KLOWSHT-roo DOO ahnng-TEE-goo koong-VAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum occupies a historic convent, making the cloister a central architectural feature.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o claustro do convento.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo DOO koong-VAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the convent cloister.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the convent cloister.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KLOWSHT-roo DOO koong-VAYNG-too.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o claustro do convento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guides are
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is housed in a former convent, with service points typically near the main historical gate.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao balcão de entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, next to the entrance counter.

responses.english: Good day, next to the entrance counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW bahl-KOWN DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao balcão de entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman mosaics are
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontram os mosaicos romanos expostos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh ehsh-PAWS-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Roman archaeological finds are central to the collection, often displayed in ground-floor halls.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na galeria dos mosaicos romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH guh-lih-REEUH DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, in the Roman mosaics gallery.

responses.english: Good day, in the Roman mosaics gallery.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH guh-lih-REEUH DOOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na galeria dos mosaicos romanos.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de presentes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh?

likely_response.local: A loja de presentes fica perto da saída. Siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The gift shop is near the exit. Follow the signs.

responses.english: The gift shop is near the exit. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh DIH preh-ZAYNG-tihsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.french: A loja de presentes fica perto da saída. Siga as placas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide is
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically available at a designated pickup point inside the museum.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar informações sobre os mosaicos romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira ou ao balcão de informações para obter detalhes sobre os mosaicos romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh awb-TEHR dih-TAH-lyihsh SOHB-rih OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office or information desk for details about the Roman mosaics.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office or information desk for details about the Roman mosaics.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh awb-TEHR dih-TAH-lyihsh SOHB-rih OOSH moo-ZEYE-koosh roo-MAHN-noosh.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira ou ao balcão de informações para obter detalhes sobre os mosaicos romanos.
